---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving the UBO Knowledge Graph
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how someone would use this feature:

```
// Example pseudocode or workflow
```

## Proposed Solution

If you have ideas about how to implement this, describe them here. Otherwise, feel free to leave this blank.

## Alternative Approaches

Are there other ways to solve this problem that you've considered?

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots that help explain your feature request.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature is clearly related to UBO Knowledge Graph's mission (ownership mapping, AML/KYC, intelligence analysis)
- [ ] This feature is within the scope of the modular architecture
